description: Polar is a merchant-of-record and billing platform for selling software, subscriptions, and digital products. It handles checkout, subscriptions, tax compliance, customer portal functions, and automated benefit delivery such as license keys and downloads.
summary: Polar exposes a REST HTTP API with core and customer-portal surfaces plus remote MCP servers for production and sandbox; authentication is via organization bearer tokens, customer session bearer tokens, or OAuth 2.0/OpenID Connect access tokens depending on surface.
